query: VHS tape distortion glitch tracking error scanlines
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / analog_degradation: VHS scanlines, tracking errors, pixel grid distortion

response.objective_caption: An extreme close-up of an LCD screen showing individual RGB subpixels arranged in vertical stripes of red, green, and blue. A large black numeral '7' is visible against the pixel grid, created by darkened segments within the regular pattern of illuminated dots.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A macro photograph revealing the raw physical structure of an LCD display, where the image dissolves into discrete RGB subpixels arranged in vertical stripes of red, green, and blue. The numeral '7' emerges from darkened segments within the pixel grid, rendered with visible aliasing and the blocky, fragmented quality of extreme digital enlargement. The composition abandons traditional photographic subject matter in favor of pure digital materiality, exposing the normally invisible substrate of screen technology and transforming functional hardware into an abstract field of color and pattern.
